message:
docs(async): Complete async command execution architecture design

Comprehensive architecture for migrating bubbletea from std::thread to tokio:

- Multi-threaded runtime with configurable workers
- AsyncCmd type alongside backward-compatible Cmd
- tokio::sync::mpsc channels with backpressure handling
- CancellationToken + TaskTracker for graceful shutdown
- Phased migration path (4 phases)

Closes charmed_rust-vgl, unblocks charmed_rust-u2y implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
